subject: A weathered stepped stone pyramid silhouetted against a burning orange sunset sky, with smaller pyramids visible in the distance
description: A massive weathered stepped pyramid dominates the center of the frame, its tiered stone construction crumbling in places to reveal the slow toll of time. The structure stands silhouetted against a hot orange and rust-red sunset sky streaked with hazy cloud. Behind and to the sides, the indistinct silhouettes of more stepped pyramids recede into the smoky, dust-blown distance, suggesting a lost city or sacred complex. The foreground is a rough plain of broken stone and rubble. There are no figures present — the scene reads as ancient, abandoned, and monumental, the architecture itself the protagonist.
foreground: broken stone rubble, dusty ground at the base of the pyramid
background: smaller stepped pyramids fading into a hazy sunset sky
